title: Taxi Zagreb Airport to Skradin | Fixed €485 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Zagreb Airport to Skradin. Fixed €485 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.

schema.name: Taxi Zagreb Airport to Skradin
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Zagreb Airport to Skradin, 485 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Zagreb Airport to Skradin, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 970 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Skradin from Zagreb Airport, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Zagreb Airport to Skradin is around 338 km and takes roughly 3 h 35 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: Where do you meet me at Zagreb Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: In the arrivals hall, just after baggage reclaim, holding a sign with your name. I help with the luggage and walk you to the car.

mainEntity.name: What if my flight is delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No problem. I track your flight in real time and adjust the pickup to the actual landing, with no extra charge for the wait.

mainEntity.name: How much is the transfer from Zagreb Airport to Skradin?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 485 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, tolls and luggage included. A return trip is 970.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can plan around your flight. For a same-day pickup after a sudden change, call or WhatsApp me and I will help if I can.
